interface.longDescription:
Discover your next home with Australia's #1 address in property. Describe your property criteria to search Australian listings and view results on a map, complete with photos and description of the property, pricing and key attributes. If you find something you like, we’ll help you connect with the agent or save your favourite property for later.

You can try asking: Show me apartments in Richmond, VIC with 2 bedrooms under $1,000,000

Search for properties to buy anywhere in Australia by budget, bedrooms, bathrooms, and features, and sort results by price, newest listings, or relevance. Start your property search today with realestate.com.au — a trusted source for Australia’s property listings.

---

Legal and privacy
Your use of our app is subject to our terms of use available at https://about.realestate.com.au/terms-use/  and our privacy policy available at https://www.realestate.com.au/legal/privacy-policy. Our privacy policy explains how we collect, use and disclose personal information and how to access, correct or complain about the handling of personal information.

Please note: your use of Google Maps is subject to the Google Maps Terms of Service and Google Privacy Policy available at https://maps.google.com/help/terms_maps/ and https://policies.google.com/privacy.
defaultPrompt: Com.au show 3 bed houses in Richmond, VIC
